metadata.description: Victor's Claude Code plugins — statusline, coding skills, and more.

plugins.name: claude-statusline
plugins.description: Zero-dependency statusline with rainbow progress bar, 10 themes, rate limit monitoring, and natural language config.

plugins.name: coding-skills
plugins.description: Opinionated coding skills for TypeScript, React, and Python — TDD workflows, SOLID principles, spec-driven design, and code review.

plugins.name: sysadmin-skills
plugins.description: ITIL 4-based IT operations skills — incident response, change management with CAB review, and status communication.
